# renewal-risk-sweep — generated workflow

> Generated by the Workflow Press from the frozen contract (version 1).
> Do not edit the generated Go by hand — update the contract and regenerate.

**Goal.** Weekly, for each account with a renewal within 60 days, pull the usage trend; if usage is down more than 20 percent, flag the account at-risk, create a CS task, and draft outreach for the CSM.

**Operator.** revops

## States

- `idle` (initial) — Waiting for the weekly sweep trigger.
- `selecting` — Selecting accounts with a renewal within 60 days.
- `analyzing` — Pulling the usage trend for each selected account.
- `flagged` (terminal) — Accounts whose usage dropped more than 20 percent are flagged at-risk; CS task created and outreach drafted.

## Transitions

- `idle` → `selecting` on **weekly_sweep** (scheduled, `0 9 * * MON`)
- `selecting` → `analyzing` on **accounts_selected** (internal) guarded by `renewal_within_60d`
- `analyzing` → `flagged` on **usage_analyzed** (internal) guarded by `usage_down_over_20pct`

## Actions

- **select_renewing_accounts** (read) on `weekly_sweep` → crm
- **pull_usage_trend** (read) on `accounts_selected` → analytics-warehouse
- **create_cs_task** (internal-write) on `usage_analyzed` → crm — requires approval — idempotent
- **draft_outreach** (external-write) on `usage_analyzed` → email-draft — requires approval

## Exceptions

- **usage_data_unavailable**: when the analytics warehouse has no usage rows for an account in the period — skip the trend test, flag the account for manual review, and do not draft outreach
- **renewal_date_missing**: when an account has no renewal_date set — exclude from the sweep and report the data-quality gap to the operator

## SLAs

- **usage_freshness**: age of the usage data used for the trend ≤ 24h
- **sweep_completion**: time to complete the weekly sweep after trigger ≤ 2h

## Verification scenarios

- **at_risk_account_is_flagged** — fire `weekly_sweep` (expects approval); expects 3 transition(s)
- **stable_usage_is_not_flagged** — fire `usage_analyzed`; expects 0 transition(s)
- **renewal_too_far_out_is_skipped** — fire `accounts_selected`; expects 0 transition(s)

## Execution safety

Actions run through the Workflow Press Executor seam. In this phase the only
backend is the fail-closed host stub: every external write is recorded as **gated**
and is never performed live. The durable adapter (`inngest.go`) is
behavior-equivalent to the local runtime.
